alerts.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
alerts.description: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

alerts.title: Starcloud raises $170 million Series A to build data centers in space
alerts.description: Starcloud becomes the fastest Y Combinator startup to reach unicorn status, just 17 months after demo day.

alerts.title: Autonomous ship startup Saronic raises $1.75 billion in race to modernize U.S. military
alerts.description: Saronic's latest funding round more than doubles its valuation to $9.25 billion from the prior fundraising early last year.

alerts.title: Nvidia-backed ThinkLabs AI raises $28 million to tackle a growing power grid crunch
alerts.description: ThinkLabs AI, a startup building artificial intelligence models that simulate the behavior of the electric grid, announced today that it has closed a $28 million Series A financing round led by Energy Impact Partn

alerts.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
alerts.description: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

alerts.title: Nomadic raises $8.4 million to wrangle the data pouring off autonomous vehicles
alerts.description: The company turns footage from robots into structured, searchable datasets with a deep learning model.

alerts.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
alerts.description: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.

alerts.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
alerts.description: Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.

alerts.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
alerts.description: As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.

alerts.title: South Korean AI Chipmaker Raises $400 Million for Inference
alerts.description: The evolving AI inference market presents opportunities for new players, such as Rebellions, to offer silicon diversity.

alerts.title: AI Legal Platform Startup Reaches $11B Valuation
alerts.description: The rapid growth of legal AI was underscored by a decline in legal data provider stocks after Anthropic's recent release of a legal plugin for its Cowork agent system.

alerts.title: Tencent to Double AI Spending to More Than $5B Over Next Year
alerts.description: The vendor is getting into the fast-growing AI personal agent market.

alerts.title: Oracle cutting thousands in latest layoff round as company continues to ramp AI spending
alerts.description: Oracle has ratcheted up its capital expenditures as it builds data center infrastructure that can handle AI workloads.

alerts.title: Indian mobile giant Airtel raises $1 billion for data centers from Carlyle, other PE firms
alerts.description: Signaling rising global interest in India’s data‑center sector, Bharti Airtel has attracted private‑equity interest as it seeks to raise $1 billion.

alerts.title: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions raises $400 million ahead of IPO
alerts.description: Rebellions' chips are focused on AI inferencing, putting it in competition with Nvidia as well as other startups from Groq to Cerebras.
